steps: discover executable with CGC_COMPETITOR_BIN, cgc, then codegraphcontext

environment_variables.CGC_COMPETITOR_BIN: absolute path to cgc or codegraphcontext executable
environment_variables.CGC_COMPETITOR_COMMIT: pinned git commit SHA recorded from the cloned competitor repo
environment_variables.CGC_COMPETITOR_HOME: optional isolated home/cache root for benchmark subprocesses
environment_variables.CGC_COMPETITOR_INSTALL_MODE: editable, local-wheel, or other local install mode
environment_variables.CGC_DATABASE_BACKEND: detected or declared backend when available; defaults to kuzudb
environment_variables.TREE_SITTER_LANGUAGE_PACK_CACHE_DIR: optional pre-populated tree-sitter-language-pack cache for offline parser loading

fairness_rules: fresh index per run unless a warm-cache mode is explicitly labeled
machine-readable reports distinguish unsupported capability from incorrect result
no SOTA superiority claim without measured evidence

metadata.policy: vectors suggest; graph verifies; packet proves

notes: prompt seeds, explicit exact seeds, and Stage 0 candidates are unioned
exact seeds bypass vector filters
binary candidates are suggestions only
deterministic local reranker returns candidates for graph verification
exact seeds are preserved even if top-N is small
graph/source verification controls final packet membership
heuristic_or_inferred_paths_labeled=13
packet_paths=0, snippets=0
